message:
feat(runtime): add evidence telemetry and improve rendering pipeline

ftui-render crate:
- Cargo.toml: Update dependencies for rendering improvements
- src/buffer.rs: Buffer management optimizations
- src/diff.rs: Diff algorithm refinements for better performance
- src/lib.rs: Module re-exports and documentation updates

ftui-runtime crate:
- src/input_fairness.rs: Input event scheduling improvements
- src/lib.rs: Runtime initialization and lifecycle updates
- src/program.rs: Program state machine refinements
- src/terminal_writer.rs: Terminal output optimizations
- src/evidence_telemetry.rs: NEW - Evidence-based telemetry system for
  debugging and performance analysis in deterministic replay scenarios

ftui-style crate:
- src/table_theme.rs: Table theming system enhancements with new
  Aurora and Graphite theme variants

ftui-widgets crate:
- src/command_palette/scorer.rs: Fuzzy matching algorithm improvements
- src/log_viewer.rs: Log viewing widget updates
- src/table.rs: Table widget rendering refinements

ftui-extras visual effects:
- src/visual_fx/effects/canvas_adapters.rs: Canvas adapter improvements
- src/visual_fx/effects/plasma.rs: Plasma effect refinements

ftui-core crate:
- tests/pty_terminal_session.rs: NEW - PTY terminal session tests
  for integration testing of terminal behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,8 @@ tracing = ["ftui-core/tracing", "dep:tracing"]
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 memchr = "2.7.6"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"
+unicode-width = "0.2.2"
+unicode-display-width = "0.3.0"
 unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.0" }
 tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
